callGraph.callee:
select(
                    sold_subq.c.product_id.label("product_id"),
                    (
                        literal(0)
                        - func.coalesce(sold_subq.c.sold, 0)
                    ).label("stock"),
                )
                .select_from(sold_subq)
                .outerjoin(
                    received_subq, sold_subq.c.product_id == received_subq.c.product_id
                )
                .where
